productContent.title: Nike SB Dunk Low Pro
productContent.subtitle: Skate Shoes
productContent.description:
You can always count on a classic. The Dunk Low pairs iconic colour-blocking with premium materials and plush padding for game-changing comfort that lasts. The possibilities are endless—how will you wear your Dunks?


Benefits

  • Premium leather upper creates a classic look that's built to last.
  • The foam midsole offers lightweight, responsive cushioning.
  • The rubber outsole with classic pivot circle adds durable traction and heritage style.

Product Details

  • Foam midsole
  • Rubber outsole

content.text: Using all Italian-made materials, we have taken the Air Force 1 and pushed it into a new and innovative space. Premium Italian leather goes from patent to matt to textured in an inventive use of a single material. Elevated details like debossed logos, waxed laces and a detachable lily keyring contribute to the look without detracting from the artisanship. Minimalistic, bold and limited to 850 pairs, this shoe furthers the AF-1's legacy with its dedication to elegance and craft.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Air Force 1 'Made in Italy' Women's Shoes
productContent.title: Nike Air Force 1 'Made in Italy'
productContent.subtitle: Women's Shoes
productContent.description:
Using all Italian-made materials, we have taken the Air Force 1 and pushed it into a new and innovative space. Premium Italian leather goes from patent to matt to textured in an inventive use of a single material. Elevated details like debossed logos, waxed laces and a detachable lily keychain contribute to the look without detracting from the artisanship. Minimalistic, bold and limited to 850 pairs, this shoe furthers the AF1's legacy with its dedication to elegance and craft.


Benefits

  • The upper with perforated toe box is breathable and comfortable.
  • The rubber outsole with heritage hoops pivot circles delivers traction and durability.

Premium Italian leather goes from patent to matt to textured in an inventive use of a single material. content.text: Hiroshi Fujiwara brings his minimalistic look to the Nike Mind 002. Under the guise of concept testing, Hiroshi’s approach puts his stamp on the latest product innovation. This model was created with an alternative Flyknit upper and branding reminiscent of industry samples stamped onto the midsole.

Developed in Nike's Mind Science Department, 22 nodes move up and down against your foot in a way that is scientifically shown to activate sensory areas of the brain. Soft foam in the midsole provides robust, comfortable cushioning. The knit upper features engineered perforations for breathability. Stretchy fabric on the footbed gives the nodes room to move while still feeling soft against your foot.

properties.body:

Developed in Nike's Mind Science Department, 22 nodes move up and down against your foot in a way that is scientifically shown to activate sensory areas of the brain. Soft foam in the midsole provides robust, comfortable cushioning. The knit upper features engineered perforations for breathability. Stretchy fabric on the footbed gives the nodes room to move while still feeling soft against your foot.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Mind 002 SP FK Men's Shoes
productContent.title: Nike Mind 002 SP FK
productContent.subtitle: Men's shoes
productContent.description:
Hiroshi Fujiwara brings his minimalistic look to the Nike Mind 002. Under the guise of concept testing, Hiroshi's approach puts his stamp on the latest product innovation. This model was created with an alternative Flyknit upper and branding reminiscent of industry samples stamped onto the midsole.   


 

  • Flyknit upper provides a lightweight, sock-like fit.
  • Rubber pods near the toe and heel help provide durable traction.

Activate Your Senses

Developed in Nike's Mind Science Department, 22 nodes move up and down against your foot in a way that is scientifically shown to activate sensory areas of the brain.


Prep In Comfort

Soft foam in the midsole provides robust, comfortable cushioning. The knit upper features engineered perforations for breathability. Stretchy fabric on the footbed gives the nodes room to move while still feeling soft against your foot.


 

  • Pull tab on heel
  • Moulded foam on heel and tongue

productContent.title: Nike Rejuven8 Run
productContent.subtitle: Women's Shoes
productContent.description:
Just 'cause it's a recovery day doesn't mean you can't flex. This Rejuven8 Run comes with two removable booties for styling options. And those booties have their own thin rubber bottom so they can be worn without the upper. But if you do step into the upper, expect big comfort with its cushy foam and encapsulated Air.


Benefits

  • The sticky rubber outsole adds grip even on slick surfaces.
  • The extra room at the forefoot helps accommodate various foot widths.
  • The ventilation holes help allow for breathability.
  • Nike Air technology absorbs impact for cushioning with every step.

content.text: Introducing Nike Noir—the debut silhouette of First Sight, a collection designed to push athletic style into new realms.

Born from Nike running DNA, the Noir blends sport with statement-making style. Its sleek, one‑piece upper is sculpted with bold, fluid lines and anchored by dramatic branding that commands attention. A circular heel cut-out nods directly to Nike's iconic track spikes, reimagined here as a modern style signature.

A thick, angular midsole delivers height, presence and just the right amount of edge. The result is a balance of sophistication and raw speed—a shoe crafted for those who are always ahead of the curve.

properties.body:
Introducing Nike Noir—the debut silhouette of First Sight, a collection designed to push athletic style into new realms.
Born from Nike running DNA, the Noir blends sport with statement-making style. Its sleek, one‑piece upper is sculpted with bold, fluid lines and anchored by dramatic branding that commands attention. A circular heel cut-out nods directly to Nike's iconic track spikes, reimagined here as a modern style signature.
A thick, angular midsole delivers height, presence and just the right amount of edge. The result is a balance of sophistication and raw speed—a shoe crafted for those who are always ahead of the curve.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike First Sight Noir Women's Shoes
productContent.title: Nike First Sight Noir
productContent.subtitle: Women's Shoes
productContent.description:
Introducing Nike Noir—the debut silhouette of First Sight, a collection designed to push athletic style into new realms. Born from Nike Running DNA, the Noir blends sport with statement-making style. Its sleek one-piece upper, circular heel cut-out and thick, angular midsole work together to balance sophistication and raw speed. What you get is a shoe crafted for those who are always ahead of the curve.


Benefits

  • Soft foam midsole cushions every step.
  • Heel cut-out references Nike track spikes.
  • Dramatic branding adds distinction to your look.
